asr_preview.text: Minnesota did very well last night. It's a rivalry series. The puck's down here, and we're playing more North Dakota versus Gophers. Oh, a good chance right off the jump. Jayden Perron feeding it over to Reese Gaber. Those two getting the start tonight as you see the lines going across the top of your screen.

Two changes for UND in the lineup this evening. Nate Benoit and Griffin Ness draw in. And now a chance the other way. Bryce Brodzinski feeding it across. Good stuff by Person. Follow-up chance by Nelson. Batted out by Bird. I'm not sure if Bird stopped a goal right there by batting that out of the air. But action back and forth right away. Brodzinski again. His shot goes high.

Bryce Brodzinski scoring the empty netter last night. This is for the Gophers right here. A puck goes in. A good job getting that puck over and a big save on Rhett Pitlick. Poked that puck out in front as well. And the rebound just unable to get to it was Jackson Nelson. Lost it in his skates. Griffin Ness, his season debut tonight. Up to Carson Albrecht.
